chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3269 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.17271/2018 2. For hearing of CMA No.15341/2017 3. For hearing of main case 11.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Anwar Shahid, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Per learned AAG this petition is misconceived. It is primarily seeks to agitate the rights in the immoveable property and even otherwise relief is sought against a private respondent, not amenable to writ jurisdiction. Learned counsel for the petitioner remains unable to dispel the same. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
